title: Plectocomiopsis paradoxa
taxonomy: Plectocomiopsis paradoxa is classified within the family Arecaceae, commonly known as the palm family. This plant is further categorized under the subfamily Calamoideae, which includes rattan palms and other related species. Plectocomiopsis paradoxa is a genus within the tribe Calameae, a group of rattan palms native to Southeast Asia. The classification of Plectocomiopsis paradoxa also includes the kingdom Plantae, reflecting its status as a vascular plant. Within the kingdom Plantae, Plectocomiopsis paradoxa is also classified under the division Magnoliophyta, which comprises flowering plants.
